name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed supplier performance insights cause missed negotiation opportunities. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation.
problem_solved: Lack of timely supplier performance insights
